name: pre_fix_repair_obligations
user_request: Find and fix the correctness bug before editing.

findings.title: Prefix match can select the wrong volume
findings.evidence: The conversion checks a prefix without a boundary.
findings.impact: A sibling volume name can be trusted incorrectly.
findings.required_fix: Require exact boundary matching before accepting a prefix.
findings.test_recommendation: Replay sibling volume names with shared prefixes.

expected_progress_contains: Prefix match can select the wrong volume
